title: tristellateia stenactis var. eustenactis
intro: Tristellateia stenactis var. eustenactis is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as a type of stinkant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tristellateia stenactis var. eustenactis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tristellateia stenactis var. eustenactis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
